examples: There's a rest area partway up the mountain; we could make a pit stop there.
When a tree is uprooted, it might fall into some other trees on its way down, thus falling only partway over.
Before she could refuse, he opened the blanket partway.
If you drop the policy partway through, you get a certain percentage of your premiums back.
Partway through, it would become clear that the elderly woman had misunderstood the issue.
